Tapping Accept should show the enrollment confirmation message.

Verifies that addNotification() correctly writes a document to Firestore with all fields populated and isRead defaulting to false.

When the chosen list is empty, the empty state message should be shown.

When the chosen list has entrants, the RecyclerView should be visible.

The status message should be hidden before any button is tapped.
testTabsAreDisplayed() - Method in class com.example.eventmanager.EventListsViewActivityTest
The screen should display two tabs: Waiting List and Chosen List.
testWaitingList_EmptyStateShown() - Method in class com.example.eventmanager.EventListsViewActivityTest
When the waiting list is empty, the empty state message should be shown and the RecyclerView should be hidden.
testWaitingList_RecyclerViewShownWhenPopulated() - Method in class com.example.eventmanager.EventListsViewActivityTest
When the waiting list has entrants, the RecyclerView should be visible and the empty state should be hidden.

The waiting list count TextView should be visible on the Waiting tab.
